name: Standard Cabin
descriptionShort: Give the kids a vacation they'll talk about for years. Cottage 10 is a warm, welcoming two-bedroom cabin crafted with families in mind..
descriptionLong:
Give the kids a vacation they'll talk about for years. Cottage 10 is a warm, welcoming two-bedroom cabin crafted with families in mind — two cozy double beds, a well-stocked kitchen for family meals, and a screened porch where little ones can play without a care in the world.
      When the sun goes down, roast marshmallows at your own bonfire pit (wood is on us), and when it rises, head out to ski, hike, fish, or kayak — Calabogie's playground is right at your doorstep. Parents will love the fuss-free setup; kids will love absolutely everything else.
Address: 5253 Calabogie Road, Calabogie, Ontario K0J 1H0, Canada
shortDescription: Spacious 2-bedroom Lakeside House in Calabogie with backyard and modern amenities...
